description_long: This is a pair of low-top, lace-up sneakers with a clean, minimalist design, primarily in white. The shoes feature a smooth upper with subtle stitching details and a slightly raised sole, typical of casual streetwear. On the outer side of each shoe, there is a distinctive black graphic logo that adds a touch of urban style. The laces are arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, and the tongue and collar are lightly padded for comfort. The heel and toe areas are reinforced, suggesting durability for everyday use. The overall appearance is fresh and unworn, making these shoes suitable for a variety of urban environments.
description: A pair of white low-top sneakers with a black graphic logo, smooth upper, and standard criss-cross lacing. The shoes appear new and are designed for casual urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, laces, and symmetrical shape of both shoes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the black graphic logo, smooth upper, and the profile of the sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the heel structure and the opening of the shoes.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the black logo visible, showing the clean lines and stitching.
attribute_logo: Black graphic logo on the outer side of each shoe, angular and stylized in shape.
